name: RIC Spillover Dividend Election

eligibility.description: The RIC must declare the dividend by the 15th day of the 9th month after year-end and distribute it within 12 months following the close of the year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A RIC can elect to treat dividends paid after the close of the taxable year as having been paid during the prior year, reducing the prior year's taxable income.
